hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(docs/|\.claude/|\.github/|\.gitignore|package\.json)' || echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(md|json|yml|yaml)$'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css)$'; then PROJ_DIR=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ ! -f "$PROJ_DIR/.claude/.current-issue" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: No approved issue marker. Follow Project OS workflow: Plan -> Plan Hardening -> Review Verdict -> GH Issue -> User Approval -> Execute."}'; exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(docs/|\.claude/|\.github/|\.gitignore|package\.json)' || echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(md|json|yml|yaml)$'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css)$'; then PROJ_DIR=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ ! -f "$PROJ_DIR/.claude/.current-issue" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: No approved issue marker. Follow Project OS workflow before creating source files."}'; exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0

CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'gh issue create|gh pr create'; then PROJ_DIR=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ ! -f "$PROJ_DIR/.claude/.blueprint-approved" ] && [ ! -f "$PROJ_DIR/.claude/.plan-review-approved" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Plan review verdict not completed."}'; exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0
